claim: Placing a raw, cut onion in contact with your foot overnight “purifies your blood”, removes “toxins”, and heals your body.

result.claim: Placing a raw, cut onion in contact with your foot overnight “purifies your blood”, removes “toxins”, and heals your body.
result.reasoning: A thorough search for propositions and chunks related to "onion on foot purifies blood removes toxins heals body" and "onion health benefits detoxification blood purification" did not yield any scientific evidence to support the claim. The search results included information about the effects of garlic oil constituents on detoxification enzymes in rats (Paper ID 13) and the use of dandelion root extract for leukemia (Paper ID 56), but none of these are relevant to the specific claim about placing a raw, cut onion on the foot overnight for blood purification, toxin removal, or healing. There is no scientific basis found in the provided knowledge base for this claim.
